ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the race */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the race */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the venues table */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the race_types table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the boat (e.g., RS 400, RS 200) */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating handicap for the boat */,
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the helm */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_helm_id FOREIGN KEY ("helm_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sailor (e.g., helm, crew) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sailor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the boat in the race */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time for the boat in the race */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time for the boat in the race */,
  "bce" TEXT /* Time difference from the best corrected time (BCE) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the boat for the race */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the boat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, scorer, participant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., scorer, judge) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_officials_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
